name: Ramp Business Card
title: Ramp Business Card (Ramp)
text:
Card: Ramp Business Card (Ramp)
Best for Business Expense Automation
Pros: Built-in expense management and accounting integrations,Real-time visibility into business spending,Up to 1.5% cashback on all card spend,No annual fee,No foreign transaction fees,No personal guarantee or credit check required to apply
Cons: No points or travel transfer partners for those looking to maximize rewards through redemptions,Full balance must be paid each month (no option to carry a balance),Only available to businesses (not available to sole proprietors)
Why we chose it: The Ramp Card stands out for its no-annual-fee structure, straightforward expense controls and seamless integration with popular business tools. It’s a solid option for established U.S.-based businesses that want a corporate card without a personal guarantee or credit check. Ramp’s all-in-one platform adds value for businesses focused on streamlining expense management.
Who it's good for: The Ramp Card is best for small to mid-sized businesses and startups looking to simplify spend management while earning consistent cash back. If your company values automation, real-time insights and easy expense control over complex reward programs, Ramp is a powerful tool for scaling efficiently without the hassle of traditional business credit cards.
Annual fee: $0
Rewards: 1.5% cash-back
Intro bonus: $1,000 Welcome Bonus. Bonus will be paid via virtual card after your application is approved. Limit 1 per customer. No minimum spend required.
APR: 
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/business/
